default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO performance and initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant growth in website visitors (6x increase) and impressions (35% increase) over the past month](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Need to refine content strategy to focus on more specific, use case-driven topics aligned with Firework's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
